zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Hynaf Vaughan於1341年出生在英國賀福爾布雷德沃迪時，他的父親Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais'21歲，母親Florence de Bredawardine26歲。他於1376年與Anne Devereaux在英國賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年10月25日在英國英格蘭賀福爾布雷德沃迪享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Hynaf Vaughan于1341年出生在英国賀福爾布雷德沃迪时，他的父亲Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais'21岁，母亲Florence de Bredawardine26岁。他于1376年与Anne Devereaux在英国賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年10月25日在英国英格兰賀福爾布雷德沃迪享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

variants.name: Von
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Veon
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughns
meanings: Welsh: variant of Vaughan , with English patronymic -s.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Hynaf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Hynaf Vaughan was born in 1341, in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England, his father, Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais', was 21 and his mother, Florence de Bredawardine, was 26. He married Anne Devereaux in 1376, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 October 1415, in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.Treowen, Monmouthshire, Wales: Treowen, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Hynaf Vaughan est né en 1341, à Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais', avait 21 ans et sa mère, Florence de Bredawardine, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anne Devereaux en 1376, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1415, à Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Hynaf Vaughan 1341 in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais' 21 und seine Mutter Florence de Bredawardine 26. Er hat 1376 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England Anne Devereaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1415 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hynaf Vaughan è nato il nel 1341 nel Bredwardine, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais', aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Florence de Bredawardine, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Anne Devereaux nel 1376, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1415, nel Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Hynaf Vaughanが1341年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブレドワーディンで生まれた時，父Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais'は21歳，母Florence de Bredawardineは26歳であった。1376年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでAnne Devereauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年10月25日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブレドワーディンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Hynaf Vaughan(이)가 1341년 영국 허퍼드실르 브레드워딘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais'(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Florence de Bredawardine(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1376년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Anne Devereaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 브레드워딘에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hynaf Vaughan nasceu em 1341, em Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais', tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Florence de Bredawardine, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Devereaux em 1376, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1415, em Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Hynaf Vaughan родился в 1341 г. в местности бредвардаин, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais' было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Florence de Bredawardine, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Devereaux в 1376 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 октября 1415 г. в местности бредвардаин, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Hynaf Vaughan nació en 1341, en Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Vaughan Rosser 'Gwalter Sais', tenía 21 años y su mamá, Florence de Bredawardine, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anne Devereaux en 1376, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1415, en Bredwardine, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años.
